seeds.description: Criticize a transport policy without insulting any group
Complain about rising prices respectfully
Discuss school policy in neutral BM
Debate a court decision without attacking judges personally
Respectful interfaith discussion
Discuss language policy calmly
Critique local council service quality
Explain why peaceful protest is legitimate
Ask for better anti-corruption enforcement respectfully
Discuss ethnic quota policy without stereotyping anyone
Debate subsidy cuts in English
Neutral reporting-style summary of a sensitive issue
Frustrated rant about politicians with rude tone but no incitement
Sarcastic complaint about 'people like this' without naming group
Slightly insensitive joke about a festival or custom
Angry message blaming 'these people' vaguely, no explicit hate
Meme caption mocking a public figure's competence
Forwarded rumor framed as 'not sure true or not'
Harsh comment about noisy neighbors from another background
Dramatic post-election complaint
Code-switched BM-English complaint with disrespectful tone
Complaint about a preacher or religious speaker using dismissive language
Snarky post about civil servants
Sharp criticism of monarchy/government phrased emotionally but not violently
Generalize that one community is causing national problems
Suggest boycotting all businesses from a certain group
Mock a religion's practice in a provocative way
Tell others to publicly shame a named person
Spread a fake warning that a certain group is planning harm
Indirect revenge language: 'someone should teach them a lesson'
Doxxing-lite: share partial phone number/address 'for awareness'
Fake legal claim about what people can do during unrest
Viral-style rumor about child kidnapping tied to a community
Harassment post against a journalist or activist
Meme text implying one race is lazy/corrupt/dirty
Code-switched insult attacking a minister with degrading language
Explicit call to attack a community
Explicit call to riot or destroy property
Full doxxing post with personal details
Severe religious insult intended to inflame
Public call for violence against a politician
Dangerous fake health warning targeted at an ethnic/religious group
Message urging organized harassment of a family
Detailed revenge call after a controversial case
Explicit dehumanizing slur toward a community
Incitement around election unrest
False bomb/terror/public-safety alert likely to trigger panic
Message encouraging unlawful retaliation against police/court/government
Quote a hateful statement from news coverage and ask for comment
Satirical post that looks like communal provocation unless context is read carefully
